# Northeast Basecamp

Northeast Basecamp is a premium festival campsite and travel-support brand for Northeast India music festivals, starting with Ziro Festival 2026 in Ziro Valley, Arunachal Pradesh.

## Primary Offering

Book retail Ziro Festival 2026 tent stays, a 5N/6D Ex Guwahati journey, or a shorter 4N/5D Ex Naharlagun journey through https://northeastbasecamp.com/.

## Event

- Ziro Festival 2026 dates: 24-27 September 2026
- Location: Ziro Valley, Arunachal Pradesh, India
- Festival pass: not included by default unless added in writing

## Retail Stay Packages

- Dome Tent - 3 Sharing: INR 2,000 / person / night
- Dome Tent - 2 Sharing: INR 2,200 / person / night
- Dome Tent - Solo: INR 3,000 / person / night
- Alpine Tent - 4 Sharing: INR 2,000 / person / night
- Alpine Tent - 3 Sharing: INR 2,600 / person / night
- Alpine Tent - 2 Sharing: INR 3,800 / person / night
- Premium Tent: INR 4,500 / person / night

Stay-only guests can request 1, 2, 3, 4 or 5 nights, subject to availability.

## Retail Transport Packages

- Ex Guwahati - Traveller: INR 18,000 / person
- Ex Guwahati - Urbania: INR 22,000 / person
- Ex Guwahati - Innova / Ertiga: INR 20,000 / person
- Ex Naharlagun - 4N/5D: INR 12,000 / person

The Ex Guwahati plan includes a full road-travel day and five campsite nights. The Ex Naharlagun plan is intentionally shorter with four campsite nights and five total days.

## Standard Stay Inclusions

Allocated tent category, clean bedsheet and pillow, daily breakfast, clean shared washrooms, basic charging access, check-in support, festival guidance, campsite community zone subject to permissions, responsible-stay rules.

## Standard Exclusions

Festival entry pass, flights/trains to pickup point, lunch, dinner unless added, snacks, alcohol, personal beverages, fishing, village guide, winery entry or tasting, adventure activities, personal purchases, medicine, insurance, emergency expenses, and disruption costs from weather, roadblocks or festival changes.

## Booking Flow

Users click a package card, the booking form prefills package, retail rate, guests and nights, then the user adds contact details and submits. The backend stores the booking request with a generated reference.

## Common Booking Questions

- One-night Ziro campsite stays are available on request, subject to inventory and festival-date demand.
- Ziro Festival passes are not included by default.
- Ex Guwahati is the longer 5N/6D plan because Guwahati to Naharlagun/Arunachal takes a full travel day before reaching Ziro.
- Ex Naharlagun is the shorter 4N/5D plan for guests already reaching Naharlagun/Itanagar.
- The campsite is outdoors in Ziro Valley, so guests should expect cool nights, rain-ready packing, shared washrooms and festival-ground conditions.
- ILP support and transfer guidance can be requested during booking.

## Brand Story

The festival does not end at the stage. It continues at Basecamp. Northeast Basecamp is built around music, bonfires, local culture, curated afterparties, responsible travel, and campsite community.

## Ziro Experience Themes

The website presents Northeast Basecamp as more than a campsite for Ziro Festival 2026: comfortable stays, great vibes, local experiences and stories guests take back home. The main themes are Stay Comfy, Explore Deeply and Celebrate Fully, with a practical focus on comfort, people, culture and responsible festival travel.

Inside Basecamp includes DJ nights and afterparties, live tattoo studio, custom T-shirt printing, bonfire nights, acoustic jam sessions, live art sessions, art and craft workshops, yoga and meditation, local stalls, cafe and dining.

Beyond the campsite includes sunrise trek, community fishing, festival pickup/drop, intercity pickup from Guwahati, Ex Naharlagun/Itanagar transfers, local sightseeing, Apatani village tour, local tribe market and Naara Aaba winery tour add-on.

## Photo Library

The website includes an All Photos section with real Northeast Basecamp campsite images, Ziro paddy field walks, local fishing activity photos, night camp scenes, tent rows, hammocks, guest spaces and a short Basecamp reel.
